script.title: Rethink Your Morning Routine
script.description: A morning routine that sets you up for failure, and how to fix it for achieving monthly goals
script.narration: You're not lazy, you're just setting yourself up to fail. Most morning routines are designed to make you feel productive, not actually achieve your monthly goals. Think about it, if you're spending two hours every morning on yoga and journaling, that's two hours you're not spending on what actually matters. So, what if you flipped it on its head? What if your morning routine was designed to get you straight into the work that moves the needle? It's not about being more disciplined, it's about being more intentional.

scenes.description: A person waking up to a cluttered desk with productivity apps open
A person working on their laptop in a coffee shop, focused on their monthly goals
A person planning out their month, setting intentional goals

youtube.title: Fix Your Morning Routine
youtube.description: Most morning routines are designed to make you feel productive, not actually achieve your monthly goals. What if you flipped it on its head? What if your morning routine was designed to get you straight into the work that moves the needle? It's not about being more disciplined, it's about being more intentional. So, what's the one thing you can change today to start achieving your monthly goals? What if the answer was simpler than you thought?
